metadata.description: Chewiesoft's plugin marketplace for Claude Code and Cursor — skills and commands for development workflows

plugins.name: cicd
plugins.description: Unified CI/CD troubleshooting and pipeline configuration for GitHub Actions, Docker, GHCR, and self-hosted runners

plugins.name: deploy
plugins.description: Automated deployment commands — staging and production pipelines via CD

plugins.name: codereview
plugins.description: Code review toolkit: automated pre-PR review with severity grading and model routing for token efficiency (haiku/sonnet/opus), TOCTOU race condition detection, accessibility checks, data integrity analysis, deterministic hardcoded secrets detection via Python regex script (passwords, JWT, AWS/GCP/GitHub tokens, PEM keys — GitGuardian-equivalent, applied to CODE/TESTS/CONFIG with BLOCKED banner + forced grade F, plus optional ggshield/gitleaks integration when installed), and multi-reviewer PR comment resolver (CodeRabbit, Copilot, Gemini, Codex) with severity recalibration, cross-reviewer deduplication, and GitHub conversation resolution. Stack-agnostic with TypeScript/React defaults and dotnet preset for C#/.NET projects.

plugins.name: statusline
plugins.description: Interactive setup for Claude Code status line — customize model info (with optional effortLevel badge), context bar, git branch, cost tracking, and more. Cross-platform: Bash + PowerShell.

plugins.name: release
plugins.description: Automated GitHub Release creation with categorized release notes from git history. Multi-stack (C#/.NET, Node.js, Go, Rust, Python) with --path filter for monorepo component releases. Contributor resolution via org membership cross-reference.

plugins.name: dotnet-wpf
plugins.description: Complete C#/.NET WPF development toolkit — project setup & audit, Fluent Design guide (90+ controls, DataGrid icon patterns, RowHeight sizing, form spacing recipes, UserControl height clipping diagnosis, date control MaxYear validation trap, multi-column form layouts, Grid row separators, ContentDialog confirmation pattern for destructive actions), WinForms-to-WPF MVVM migration, and FlaUI E2E testing.

plugins.name: ddd
plugins.description: Domain-Driven Design toolkit: analisa codebases e aponta violações DDD, guia strategic design (event storming, context mapping), gera specs de conversão legacy→DDD e ensina conceitos sob demanda. Agnóstica de linguagem, progressive disclosure por tema, síntese de Evans + Vernon + práticas contemporâneas.

plugins.name: retrofit-skill
plugins.description: Captures non-obvious session lessons and applies them to a target skill in this marketplace — bumps version, updates CHANGELOG, marketplace.json and README, commits and pushes.

plugins.name: dev-script
plugins.description: Generates a single-command local-dev launcher tailored to the current project — bash (dev.sh) for Linux/macOS and PowerShell (dev.ps1) for Windows. Detects the stack (compose, monorepo, frontend, backend, IdP, mkcert), produces idempotent scripts with colored prefixes per service, per-component healthchecks, robust port reclaim with pgrep fallback for kernels that hide PIDs from ss/lsof, trap cleanup, and HTTPS-on-LAN via mkcert + Caddy when the SPA does OIDC PKCE. Encodes the gotchas painfully learned in JRC projects (Vite allowedHosts, NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS for self-signed JWKS, Zitadel externalDomain drift, --tlsMode external triad, signinRedirect silent fail outside secure context, bootstrap-skip cache that masks OIDC URI drift, Playwright contexts needing ignoreHTTPSErrors against mkcert, monorepo-path regex flipping kill_known_dev_servers into a silent no-op, tsx watch not picking up .env changes leaving stale runtime, and the boot-time sanity-check pattern that catches disk-vs-heap drift in 5 seconds instead of 30 minutes).

plugins.name: zitadel-idp
plugins.description: Zitadel self-hosted OIDC field guide — captures 20+ high-friction quirks (FirstInstance env placement, volume perms, v1/v2 API split, tenant→orgId mapping, JWT validation over self-signed HTTPS via NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS + JWKS, loginV2 instance flag, silent-renew redirect URI byte-match, idempotent bootstrap 'No changes' 400, TLS-terminating reverse proxy, secure-context PKCE on LAN, boot-time signinSilent recursion, StrictMode closure trap, post_logout_redirect_uri invalid, Login UI v1 branding via privateLabelingSetting / custom_login_text / LANG-lg4DP, F5 with InMemoryWebStorage, 401 storm post --reset-zitadel from tsx-watch zombies, multi-app YAML refactor regression vs dynamic env). Bundles working docker-compose.zitadel.yml, idempotent bootstrap-zitadel.ts and reset-zitadel.sh.
